title: GlobalSpaces Platform
architecture: Full-stack monorepo featuring a React 18 client and Node.js Express server using Drizzle ORM and PostgreSQL 15+.
problem: Real estate transactions suffer from complex user permissions, fragmented tools, and compliance issues with industry data models.
solution: Created a monorepo platform supporting 6 user roles (Buyers, Tenants, Agents, Admins, etc.) fully aligned with RESO (Real Estate Standards Organization) v1.7. Designed round-based immutable snapshot tables for lease negotiations.
challenges: Configuring secure role-switching auth scopes and implementing client-side validation logic to prevent cross-account transaction violations.
lessonsLearned: Acquired skills in spec-first application layouts, database normalizations, and real estate data dictionaries standards.
futureImprovements: Build automatic Playwright integration suites and support payment gateway mappings.

title: Enterprise E-Signature Platform
architecture: A secure document signing application featuring a Node.js/Express API with PostgreSQL database layer, a React/TypeScript portal, Redux state managers, and PDF cryptographic injection.
problem: Need for custom e-signing capabilities with administrative system control parameters, maintenance windows to lock dynamic contract templates, and rules to suppress notification emails for specific signers.
solution: Engineered a secure in-house e-signature portal using Cursor AI. Implemented a system-wide Maintenance Mode with admin controls, an early-stage Express API filter, and dynamic React banners. Integrated signer email suppression modules across email queuing workers, and optimized PDF attachment extraction.
challenges: Handling client-side auto-save synchronization collisions and state leaks when the server is taken down for maintenance. Resolved by designing a custom Axios interceptor (`maintenanceInterceptor`) and injecting status-locking hooks (`useAutoSave`, `useSaveFields`) to halt client updates instantly.
lessonsLearned: Gained rich expertise in managing complex global state structures, designing resilient middleware routing controls, automating document processing pipeline extensions, and boosting developer productivity via Cursor AI.
futureImprovements: Add support for multi-recipient workflow stages and implement hardware security modules (HSM) for signing keys.

title: Event Automation & API Sync Engine
architecture: Event-driven integration engine caching Event Espresso course registrations in SQL, triggering Twilio SMS reminders, and fetching student completion certificates from Adobe Captivate APIs.
problem: High administrative overhead of manually tracking course completions, scheduling reminders, and updating student certificates across Adobe and WordPress systems.
solution: Developed a custom sync plugin processing class updates, automated Twilio reminder workflows with replies caching, and a fuzzy scoring matching algorithm for CSV data uploads.
challenges: Optimizing CSV matching speeds and database timeout issues during large class uploads, which was resolved by implementing a dedicated pre-indexed database cache manager.
lessonsLearned: Acquired experience in relational SQL database optimization, caching, and building reliable event-driven notification pipelines.
futureImprovements: Introduce a centralized status dashboard and transition background cron processes to Node.js workers.

title: UFC Custom Blocks & Components Engine
architecture: WordPress block extension plugin leveraging React JSX components, SCSS stylesheets, block metadata JSON specs, dynamic PHP shortcodes, and AJAX database synchronization layers.
problem: Requirement for high-performance responsive block elements and user role dashboard features that standard block libraries did not support.
solution: Engineered 33 custom Gutenberg React blocks, developed a Swiper-powered video slider integrated with YouTube/Vimeo APIs, registered custom coach profile capabilities, and programmed an AJAX-driven local notifications caching database.
challenges: Synchronizing YouTube/Vimeo API play states with the Swiper carousel's autoplay functions to prevent slide transitions during active video playbacks, resolved by binding custom JavaScript controllers to iframe events.
lessonsLearned: Mastered Gutenberg block lifecycle events, enqueuing localized scripts in WordPress admin spaces, and managing asynchronous updates via custom tables.
futureImprovements: Convert custom React block structures to support full site editing layouts and register render hooks server-side.

title: Motorcycle Safety Academy Custom Platform
architecture: Object-oriented custom WordPress plugin combined with a child theme override layer, custom shortcodes, and Map geolocation APIs.
problem: Default course checkouts and registration forms lacked custom styling, timezone counters, geolocation searches, and role-based redirects.
solution: Built 32 shortcode handlers, secure asynchronous authentication pages, Google Maps distance filters, and optimized checkout pages to minimize drop-off rates.
challenges: Fixing layout delays and user experience drops on mobile viewports due to heavy scroll animations, resolved by disabling mobile animations and refining theme stylesheets.
lessonsLearned: Gained expert familiarity with the WordPress event loop, actions/filters hooks lifecycle, and mobile UI rendering optimization.
futureImprovements: Refactor custom shortcode forms into Gutenberg block modules and port dashboard screens to React.

title: AI Music Melody Generation System
architecture: Deep learning sequence model comparing Recurrent Neural Networks (LSTM) for long-term structures against a first-order Markov Chain model for scale transition probability matrices.
problem: Automated composition of expressive musical sequences across Western Classical and Indian Hindustani Ragas without physical instruments.
solution: Trained deep LSTM networks on classical German piano MIDI datasets and created transition frequency grids for classical Indian Ragas. Converted generated mathematical arrays into playable MIDI outputs.
challenges: Mitigating structural monotony in LSTMs and thematic drift in Markov models, resolved by introducing temperature-based note selection and emotional boundaries.
lessonsLearned: Developed deep competency in recurrent neural networks, sequence-to-sequence modeling, and statistical music analysis.
futureImprovements: Integrate sentiment analysis for mood-matching melodies and scale to multi-instrument orchestrations.
